items.caption: A long, narrow hallway in a nursing home. the hallway is lined with green doors on the left and white doors on the right, each marked with a red sticker. the walls are painted white, and the floor is tiled in shades of gray and green. the hallway is well-lit, with a light fixture hanging from the ceiling and a window at the end of the corridor. the overall atmosphere is clean and sterile, typical of a healthcare facility.
